news-global-econ.title: Whiskey mogul offers free $200M college campus to religious groups, with one major catch
news-global-econ.description: A Vermont whiskey founder offers a free $200 million college campus to Christian institutions for a spiritual revival. Raj Peter Bhakta bought Green Mountain College in 2020.

news-global-soc.description: Veteran "60 Minutes" correspondent Scott Pelley slammed CBS for settling President Donald Trump's election interference lawsuit, saying previous owners "faced political pressure and crumbled."
